# BP-46 negative: http.Server sets both read and write timeouts
lang: go
file: BP-46-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func server() *http.Server {
	return &http.Server{
		Addr:         ":8080",
		ReadTimeout:  5 * time.Second,
		WriteTimeout: 5 * time.Second,
	}
}
